_publications._publicationTitle: The German version of the neurofibromatosis 2 impact on quality of life questionnaire correlates with severity of depression and physician-reported disease severity.

_contextSnippet: 24/55 patients were grouped into level 1 (mild disease), 27/55 were grouped into level 2 (moderate disease), and 4/55 patients were grouped into level 3 (severe disease).
details: 3-level scoring system applied to 55/77 patients: 24 mild (level 1), 27 moderate (level 2), 4 severe (level 3)
